target_fund_identity.format_clue: Narrative paragraphs in the main ACD's report and the specific fund section.
target_fund_identity.evidence_quote: On 13 December 2024, the Trojan Global Equity Fund merged with the Trojan Global Equity Fund (Ireland). Subsequently the Trojan Global Equity Fund is in the course of being wound up and the approval for the sub-fund to be terminated was granted by the FCA on 3 October 2024.

fund_size_history.format_clue: Table: 'Statement of Change in Net Assets Attributable to Shareholders' showing opening and closing net assets for the year.
fund_size_history.evidence_quote: Opening net assets attributable to shareholders 491,367 ... Closing net assets attributable to shareholders –

fee_structure.format_clue: Table in Note 13 'Shares in Issue' lists the 'Annual Management Charge' percentage for each share class.
fee_structure.evidence_quote: O O I I Accumulation Income Accumulation Income Annual Management Charge 0.85% 0.85% 1.35% 1.35%

fund_economics_yearly.format_clue: Financial statements: 'Statement of Total Return' provides net result, and Note 5 'Expenses' details the total costs and management fees charged.
fund_economics_yearly.evidence_quote: Net capital gains 78,406 Revenue 6,629 Expenses (4,200) ... Net revenue after taxation 1,571 Total return before distributions 79,977

portfolio_metrics.evidence_quote: The Fund’s comparator benchmarks are the MSCI World Index (Net Return) and the IA Global Sector (Total Return).

manager_qualitative.format_clue: Narrative paragraphs in the 'Investment Objective and Policy' section and the 'Investment Manager's Report'.
manager_qualitative.evidence_quote: The Fund’s companies are selected for their resilience to withstand a wide variety of expected and unexpected setbacks. They are also constructed and managed in such a way that allow them to adapt and grow though different economic conditions.

manager_thesis_and_decisions.format_clue: Narrative report with sections for 'Market Review', 'Portfolio Review' (detailing purchases/sales), and 'Outlook'.
manager_thesis_and_decisions.evidence_quote: The Fund made one new purchase in the year and made one disposal. It ended the period with 28 investments. The Fund made a new investment into Amadeus IT Group (‘Amadeus’). ... The last remaining shares in Becton Dickinson (‘BD’) were sold to fund the purchase of Amadeus.
